welcome.subject: You're all set, {username}! You're connected to Vibes ⚡
welcome.p1: Your account is now active and you've successfully joined our shared catalog. From now on, this is your private space to skip the internet's commercial feeds and tune directly into the real tastes of your group of friends.
welcome.step1: Go to My List and add your first movies, shows or games to enjoy.
welcome.step2: Explore your group's feed to discover what your circle is recommending.

newFriend.subject: New connection! Your network just grew on Vibes ⚡
newFriend.p1: Your interaction network just registered a new node. {friend} and you are now connected on the platform.
newFriend.p2: From now on, every saved item, vote or rating you log feeds straight into your feed and recalculates your affinities. Everything's ready: it's time to organize a meetup and put the group consensus engine to the test.
